allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Resolve-DnsName id.unity.com -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; Resolve-DnsName license.unity3d.com -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process Unity,""Unity Hub"" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id,CPU")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name Unity,''Unity Hub'',''Unity.Licensing.Client'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ''Todo detenido''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process Unity,''Unity Hub'',''Unity.Licensing.Client'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Id")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process ''Unity Hub'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders")

Bash(git add Assets/Editor/SetupEscenaAlsasua.cs Assets/Scripts/BarricadaFuego.cs Assets/Scripts/ControladorJugador.cs Assets/Scripts/ControladorPostProcesado.cs Assets/Scripts/EnemigoPatrulla.cs Assets/Scripts/GestionTilesets.cs Assets/Scripts/SistemaAtmosfera.cs Assets/Scripts/SistemaBombas.cs Assets/Scripts/SistemaClima.cs Assets/Scripts/SistemaDisparo.cs Assets/Scripts/SistemaExplosion.cs Assets/Scripts/VehiculoNPC.cs "Assets/TexturizadorEdificiosReales.cs" .gitignore)
